THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEEDHAM, KEVIN BEARD, DAMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 795 PINE ST, #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,215.44 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.44, LEASE FORFEITED, NO COSTS, NO ATTORNEY'S FEES.
